Container.Overview:
PayoffIQ is a self-hosted loan tracker for mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, HELOCs, and ARMs. Log payments, monitor balances, store documents, and model payoff scenarios with AI-assisted PDF extraction.
Features: - Dashboard with balance progress, payoff projection, and payment charts - Supports Mortgage, ARM, HELOC, Auto, and Personal loan types - Payment history with principal / interest / escrow / extra principal breakdown - PDF statement extraction via Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or Copilot (optional) - Document vault — attach PDFs and images to payments or loans - Payoff calculator with extra payment scenarios and payoff-by-date reverse calculation - ARM rate history tracking and best/worst/current scenario modeling - Escrow tracker for property tax and insurance disbursements - Login with username and password for secure remote access - All data stored locally — nothing leaves your server
Container.Description: Self-hosted loan tracker with payment history, payoff calculator, document vault, ARM modeling, and optional AI PDF extraction.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access PayoffIQ in your browser.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Where PayoffIQ stores its database and uploaded files.
